items.title: Stock Market Today, Feb. 10: Microsoft Stock Slips on Melius Downgrade Over AI Spending Risks
items.description: On Feb. 10, 2026, investors weighed fresh AI capex worries against rising long-term earnings forecasts for this software giant.

items.title: Walmart Over Amazon: Retailer Wins EBITDA Multiple Foot Race
items.description: Walmart still lags behind its online rival in market cap, even with a $1 trillion valuation, but makes up for it with its EV/EBITDA multiple.

items.title: Salesforce employees call on CEO Benioff to cancel ICE 'opportunities'
items.description: More than 1,400 Salesforce employees have signed a letter calling on CEO Marc Benioff to cancel all potential business with the U.S. ICE agency.

items.title: Coke Earnings Show Why Tech Stocks Can Take Off Again
items.description: Coke’s fourth-quarter earnings per share did edge past consensus by two cents, but its revenue fell short of expectations.

items.title: Here’s how Apple’s stock can surge in the face of rising memory costs
items.description: Here’s how Apple’s stock can surge in the face of rising memory costs
